---
name: 'Training task 🎓'
about: 'Dedicated issue for onboarding and training new members 🚀'
title: '[TRAINING] '
labels: 'good first issue, training'
assignees: ''
---

**Task Objective** 🎯
Explain the purpose of this task and what the member will learn upon completing it (e.g., "Learn how to set up the environment and compile the first code").

**Steps to complete** 🔄
A step-by-step checklist of what needs to be done:

- [ ] Step 1: Clone the repository
- [ ] Step 2: ...
- [ ] Step 3: ...

**Study Material / References** 📚
Useful links to help the member complete the task:

1. [Link to internal documentation]
2. [Link to an external tutorial]

**Acceptance Criteria** ✅
How will we know the task is successfully completed?

- [ ] The code compiles without errors.
- [ ] The Pull Request was opened and reviewed.

**Questions?** 🙋
If you are the member performing this task and get stuck at any point, reply to this issue tagging your mentor!
